meaning: adj.雕刻的,切入的,雕刻的,有锯齿状边缘的
examples: After the surface is polished, a design is incised or painted.
The logograms were incised on damp clay tablets with a stylus with a wedge shape at its end.
Noticehow cleanly this skin has been incised? There are no jags at all.
This 12th-century incense burner is incised with calligraphy that identifies its maker and first owner.
These cylindrical pieces of stone, some barely an inch in length, were incised with intaglio designs featuring gods and animals.
